# JMRH Publications — Journal of Multidisciplinary Research Horizon

## About
JMRH Publications is a peer-reviewed, open-access academic journal publishing multidisciplinary research across Commerce, Management, Economics, Education, Social Sciences, Science & Technology, Environmental Studies, and more.

- **ISSN**: Applied for
- **Website**: https://jmrh.lovable.app
- **Contact**: submissions@jmrh.in

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://jmrh.lovable.app/
- About the Journal: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/about
- Aims & Scope: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/aims-scope
- Editorial Board: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/editorial-board
- Author Guidelines: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/guidelines
- Submit Manuscript: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/submit
- Current Issue: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/current-issue
- Archives: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/archives
- Peer Review Policy: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/peer-review
- Publication Ethics: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/ethics
- Open Access Policy: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/open-access
- APC Information: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/apc
- Call for Papers: https://jmrh.lovable.app/call-for-papers
- About Us: https://jmrh.lovable.app/about-us
- Contact: https://jmrh.lovable.app/contact
- Published Books: https://jmrh.lovable.app/books/published

## Submission Process
Authors can submit manuscripts through the online portal at /journal/submit or /submit-paper. The journal follows a double-blind peer review process. Accepted manuscripts are published under open access.

## Disciplines Covered
- Commerce and Management
- Economics and Finance
- Education and Psychology
- Social Sciences and Humanities
- Science and Technology
- Environmental Studies and Sustainability
- Digital Transformation and Information Systems
- Entrepreneurship and Innovation
- Public Policy and Governance

## Policies
- Terms of Service: https://jmrh.lovable.app/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://jmrh.lovable.app/privacy
- Copyright Policy: https://jmrh.lovable.app/copyright
- Plagiarism Policy: https://jmrh.lovable.app/plagiarism-policy
- Open Access: https://jmrh.lovable.app/open-access
- Refund Policy: https://jmrh.lovable.app/refund
